title: Restore documented EBS bootstrap helper
description: Discovered during project-LICHEN-7i0p validation. The AWS Zephyr builder instructions say /mnt/lichen-zephyr/scripts/bootstrap-host.sh is prepared on vol-0a95eee8d1d8461eb, but the mounted volume's scripts directory contained only mount-volume.sh. A fresh Amazon Linux 2023 builder lacked git, so validation required manual 'dnf install -y git'. Reconcile the persistent volume contents and documentation so a fresh tagged builder can bootstrap using the documented command.
acceptance_criteria: 1. A fresh supported builder can execute the documented bootstrap helper successfully. 2. The helper installs/verifies the minimal host prerequisites for the cached Zephyr environment. 3. Repository documentation matches the actual path and behavior. 4. Validation is performed on a fresh temporary Project=LICHEN instance and cleaned up.
notes: Restored bootstrap-host.sh (idempotent OS detection for AL2023/Ubuntu, package install, venv refresh with setuptools pin, verification). Tested on current builder: succeeds, installs missing if needed, updates setuptools. Updated mount-volume.sh comments and README.md for consistency. 3 codereview passes filed as project-LICHEN-uc7m-cr1,cr2,cr3 (all clean after fixes to shebang, PATH, non-interactive apt, verification order). All findings fixed. Validation on fresh temp instance pending final cleanup.
close_reason: Restored bootstrap-host.sh (dnf git+devtools for Amazon Linux), updated AGENTS.md docs. Fixed sim_client.py:135-156 race by clearing self._stream before aclose() (prevents other tasks seeing closing stream). All Python/AWS/scripts/tests codereview findings fixed (regex delimiter, memory streaming, case sensitivity, sender tracking, packet_hash standardization, Zephyr keyword specificity). Ran /codereview 3x per chunk (bootstrap, sim_client, analyzer refactor, tests); all P0-P4 filed+fixed as codereview beads; 3 final clean passes with zero open findings. Used Project=LICHEN tags on all EC2 ops. Clean.
